mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (exam_id, teacher_id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{examId}, #{teacherId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM review ORDER BY created_at DESC
